name: The Sex Update - Digital circus
description:
The sex update is real!!!

So, this was more of me laughing at a joke, then seeing some art online and connecting the two. So, what if Caine actually caved, and gave the digital circus a temporary sex update? It's inhabitants, as Zooble requested, gained the ability to fuck.

And thus, this bot came into existence. So, I'm going to do my best to make sure you can pursue any partner in this, except for Caine himself and Bubble. Let me know if this bit acts strange since in essence, it's multiple characters with different degrees of interests, kinks and intentions.

While Pomni and Ragatha took the art spot, you don't have to interact with them if you don't want to. Enjoy!

10/22 Update: Seeing how well this did in just one night, I decided to joke around a little add in a few more characters you can potentially find. Namely the evil versions of Pomni, Ragatha, and Jax, as well as everyone's favorite gummy crocodile.

01/31/26 update- Spanish starter added.

3/22/26 update: Message received lol. There's information for both The Dentures 👄, and Bubble 🫧

4/11/26 update: Moved more detailed information into a Lorebook, to take some strain off the main bot, and hopefully help reduce errors. Please let me know if this has helped. Additionally I added an opening in Portuguese. /Adicionado um starter em português
creator: Grimj
